description: Product Description 200 Pieces Multicolor Elastic Hair Bands Hair ties may be daily essential for female, you may never count how may hair ties you have used, but we are sure you need more hair ties. So why not consider choose this 200 pieces solid color elastic hair ties? Suitable design makes your it easy to lift down the tie from hair and won’t pull off your hair. Universal soft hair ties have soft texture, you can warp it according to your hair volume. 200 pieces are enough for a family. You can use it to hold your ponytail, pigtail and bun. Premium quality is the best promise for you. To wear it when you travel, work, do yoga, hang out, go hiking, etc. It is no doubt that it works well. The simple and elegant design of thin hair bands make them as nice gift suitable for all the lady friends. 15 Pieces Mini Hair Clips Cute clips with mini size are suitable for kids, girls and women ! Durable and stylish hair clips are easy to match with your clothes, hair color, makeup and hairstyles. Hair clips are not only good for holding your hair daily life, but also perfect to style your hair to make your kids, girls and you more charming and attractive.
